fairphone fp4 fp4 fairphone4 fairphone fairphone/fp4eea/fp4:15/fp4.qrel.15.14.3/15.14.3:user/release-keys fairphone/fp4eea/fp4:13/tkq1.230127.002/tp31:user/release-keys 2025-10-05 fairphone 4 (qrel.15.14.3) update software qrel.15.14.3 is available for your fairphone 4. this system update includes the following changes: android™ 15 the fairphone 4 is getting an upgrade to android 15! this update brings enhanced security and privacy features to protect you and your device, along with some other improvements. private space create a separate private space with an additional layer of authentication to keep sensitive apps, like social, dating or banking apps, away from prying eyes. passkeys integration passkeys was first introduced by google in android 14 and is now available on fairphone, including the recent updates as part of android 15 which supports one-tap sign in. theft protection theft protection is a hub for proactive security features and tips that help keep your devices and data more secure by deterring theft and providing quick recovery in the event of a stolen device. small quality of life improvements option to increase contrast disable sending device name wifi partial screen recording interactive control center bluetooth panel app archiving set your default wallet app option to remove the search bar from your homescreen other improvements security patch level: 5th of october, 2025 more information note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. it will not be possible to use your device during this time. this includes not being able to make emergency calls. please note that data charges may apply. ab odm product system system_ext vendor

fairphone fp6 fp6 fairphone/fp6/fp6:16/fp6.qrel.16.48.0/ws15:user/release-keys 2026-02-05 the fairphone (gen. 6) (qrel.16.48.0) update the fairphone (gen. 6) is receiving the newest android 16 update. this update brings a set of new features and small quality of life improvements. read along to find out. here's a quick overview of what to expect from your new device's software build qrel.16.48.0 . everyday use & notifications two new features are introduced to structure the notifications on your home screen. bundled notifications groups notifications from the same app to avoid clutter. notification cooldown limits the sound made by succeeding notifications. other small changes include a new shortcut for wallet on your homescreen, measurement system customization and new emojis! accessibility changes a small change included to improve accessibility is the replacement of high-contrast text with outlined text. this improves readability for users who need a stronger visual contrast. security changes android 16 brings some security improvements, one of them is specifically targeted at spam calls. to protect users from potential scams, installing malicious software via sideloading or granting sensitive permissions is blocked during phone calls. other improvements security patch level: 5th of february, 2026 more information note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. it will not be possible to use your device during this time. this includes not being able to make emergency calls. please note that data charges may apply. ab odm product system system_dlkm system_ext vendor vendor_dlkm

google/frankel/frankel:16/cp1a.260505.005/15081906:user/release-keys 2026-03-05 3 月の pixel drop アップデートが利用可能になりました google pixel がさらに進化します 。google pixel のこのアップデートでは、デバイスがもっと便利になる最新の機能強化と新機能が提供されます。 詳しくはコミュニティ ページをご覧ください。 最新情報 「かこって検索」を使用してスタイルを見つけ [1,2]、お気に入りのアイテムを選択して、バーチャルで試着してみましょう [2]。 「この曲なに？」アプリは、あなたの周囲で流れている音楽を追跡し、履歴に追加します [3]。 「マジックサジェスト」は、会話に基づいてチャットのすぐ上のウィンドウでレストランの選択肢を提案するので、アプリを切り替える必要がありません [4]。 リアルタイムの交通情報や遅延アラート、スポーツのライブスコア、マーケット トレンドをロック画面上ですぐに確認できます [5,6,7]。 スマートフォンを置き忘れた場合、アラートが google pixel watch にすぐ届きます。そのまま範囲外に出るとスマートフォンは自動的にロックされるので安心です [8]。また、スマートウォッチをスマートフォンに接続すれば、より迅速な id チェックが可能になります [9]。 [1] インターネット接続が必要です。対応するアプリ、サーフェス、および「かこって検索」対応デバイスで機能します。結果は映像の一致状況によって異なります。ai による概要または ai モードが利用可能な場合に利用できます。フランスではご利用いただけません。 [2] 制限が適用される場合があります。google アカウントが必要です。18 歳以上のユーザーが対象です。米国、カナダ、英国、日本、オーストラリア、インドでのみご利用いただけます。「かこって検索」でのファッション アイテムを探す機能と「バーチャルで試着」機能は、google pixel 10 以降のスマートフォンでのみご利用いただけます。 [3] google play ストアから「この曲なに？」アプリをダウンロードします。 [4] 一部の国と言語で、google pixel 10、google pixel 10 pro、google pixel 10 pro xl、google pixel 10 pro fold でのみご利用いただけます。18 歳以上のユーザーが対象です。 [5] google pixel の「スナップショット」によるリアルタイム交通情報は、google pixel 7 以降（google pixel タブレットを除く）でのみご利用いただけます。言語による制限が適用される場合があります。ヨーロッパと英国を除く全世界で利用できます。google アカウントと google マップへの接続が必要です。 [6] 「スナップショット」のスポーツ ライブスコアは google pixel タブレットでは利用できません。言語による制限が適用される場合があります。選択したスポーツチームを google でフォローする必要があります。 [7] 「スナップショット」のマーケット トレンドは google pixel タブレットでは利用できません。google finance プラットフォームへの接続が必要です。 [8] google pixel 8 以降のモバイル デバイスと google pixel watch 2 以降でのみ利用できます。google pixel と google pixel watch の間に bluetooth 接続が必要です。 [9] google pixel 8 pro 以降でのみ利用可能です（google pixel 8 および a シリーズの google pixel デバイスを除く）。google pixel watch 3 および google pixel watch 4 でのみご利用いただけます。google pixel と google pixel watch の間に bluetooth 接続が必要です。 モバイル ネットワーク経由で、またはローミング時にアップデートをダウンロードすると、追加料金が発生する場合があります。 ab product system system_dlkm system_ext google pixel_10_pro_xl pixel 10 pro xl google google pixel 10 pro xl google mustang google/mustang/mustang:16/cp1a.260505.005/15081906:user/release-keys google/mustang/mustang:16/cp1a.260305.018/14887507:user/release-keys google/mustang/mustang:16/cp1a.260505.005/15081906:user/release-keys 2026-03-05 march pixel drop update available your pixel is getting even better... discover the latest enhancements and new features with this pixel update, designed to make your device more helpful. learn more at our community page. what's new? use circle to search to find the look[1, 2], select your favorite item, and virtually try it on.[2] the now playing app keeps track of the music playing around you and adds it to your history.[3] magic cue suggests restaurant options based on your conversation in a window right over your chat, so you never have to switch apps. [4] see real-time transit info and delay alerts, live sports scores, and market trends right on your lock screen.[5,6,7] get an instant alert on your pixel watch if you leave your phone behind, and enjoy peace of mind knowing it will lock automatically if you walk out of range.[8] and with your watch connected to your phone, you can use it for faster identity checks.[9] [1] internet connection required. works on compatible apps, surfaces, and circle to search compatible devices. results may vary depending on visual matches. available where ai overviews or ai mode is available. not available in france. [2] limitations may apply. google account required, users 18+. available only in the us, canada, uk, japan, australia, and india. find the look and try it on with circle to search available only on pixel 10 phones and newer [3] download now playing app from the google play store. [4] only available for pixel 10, pixel 10 pro, pixel 10 pro xl, and pixel 10 pro fold in select countries and languages. available to users aged 18+. [5] real-time transit info on at a glance available only on pixel 7 and newer excluding pixel tablet. language restrictions may apply. available globally except europe and the uk. connection to google account and google maps required. [6] live sport scores on at a glance not available on pixel tablet. language restrictions may apply. requires following your selected sports team on google. [7] market trends on at a glance not available on pixel tablet. connection to google finance platform required. [8] available only on pixel 8 and newer mobile devices & pixel watch 2 and newer. requires bluetooth connection between pixel phone and pixel watch. [9] available only on pixel 8 pro and newer excluding pixel 8 and a-series pixel devices. available only on pixel watch 3 and pixel watch 4. requires bluetooth connection between pixel phone and pixel watch. downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges. ab product system system_dlkm system_ext vendor vendor_dlkm

creations. general improvements and bug fixes 🌌 improved the animation smoothness of dragging icons on the launcher. ⛅ optimised the weather widget location permission prompt to reduce disruption. ⚙️ to the incorrect zoom level when re-entering. 🛡️ updated to march 2026 security patch. notes: your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. performance will return to normal homescreen. notes: live updates compatibility with apps depends on local availability and specific app integration. general improvements and bug fixes 📷 improved overall camera stability. 🚗 improved wired charging compatibility with certain vehicle models. 📱 fixed some display errors in the notification panel and quick settings. ⚙️ enhanced overall system stability and performance. 🛡️ updated to 2026-01-01 2026-04-01 nothing os 4.0(metroid-b4.0-260206-1135-jpn) nothing os 4.1(metroid-b4.1-260414-1846) what's new in this update new features 💡 caller and charging progress can now be shown on the glyph matrix by shaking your phone. to enable this, go to settings > glyph interface > flip to glyph and turn on the toggles. 📰 added an essential notifications entry in settings for easier access. find it via settings > notifications > essential notifications. 🪀 essential apps now features a recommendation section in the widget library, providing quicker access to the nothing playground to discover ai-powered community creations. general improvements and bug fixes 😎 apps in private space are now available to be updated via google play store. ⛅ optimised the weather widget location permission prompt to reduce disruption. 🔔 optimised ringtone performance for better stability and compatibility with third-party apps. 📳 optimised the stability of vibration and haptic feedback in certain scenarios. 🦻 optimised the sound volume during calls with oticon zircon 2 minirite t hearing aids. 📷 enhanced overall camera stability. 🧊 fixed an issue where the camera preview froze in portrait mode when switching from photo mode in certain scenarios. 📱 fixed an issue where dual sim ringtones could be mixed up in some cases. 🔉 fixed an issue where speaker volume could be very low when switching from a bluetooth call in some apps. 🎮 fixed an occasional issue where game audio would not resume after returning from recent apps. 📶 fixed an issue where the mobile network icon incorrectly indicated no internet in certain cases. 🌐 enhanced overall network stability. ⚙️ enhanced overall system stability. notes: your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. performance will return to normal after the update is complete. nothing os 4.1 hi there. you’re now upgrading to nothing os 4.1, powered by android 16. we'll be rolling out even more features for nothing os 4.1 in the future, so please stay tuned. take a look at what's included in this update: essential voice essential voice, a new ai-powered speech-to-text feature, lets you focus on your ideas efficiently. tap the icon on the keyboard or long-press the essential key when using the keyboard to start. key features include: 🎙️ cleans up transcriptions by filtering out interjections, filler words, and repetitions, while intelligently handling your self-corrections. 🔡 translates on the fly by detecting your translation intent and inserting the translated text directly. 🗃️ allows you to store personal phrases, like email addresses, and automatically inserts them when triggered by corresponding speech. 📑 formats the text automatically by converting speech into structured lists, steps, or bullet points when identifying those contents from the speaker. notes: for more details about essential voice, please go to settings > intelligence toolkit > essential voice. new features ⏲️ introduced the lock screen clock face from phone (3a) community edition, co-created with the community member jad zock, featuring an exclusive typeface style and unique waking-up effect. 📡 live updates now work across various scenes, such as the lock screen, notification panel, and glyph interface, tracking real-time progress from apps, like google maps, just at a glance. 💬 essential notifications settings ui has been reworked with a cleaner look and descriptions for easier use. 🫧 notifications that are frequently interacted with may be suggested to be set as essential notification. notes: live updates compatibility with apps depends on local availability and specific app integration. general improvements and bug fixes 📖 optimised the prompt instructions when activating esim for better clarity and usage. 🤳 enhanced video call stability to prevent stuttering when using certain third-party apps. 📱 fixed some display errors in the notification panel and quick settings. ⚙️ enhanced overall system stability. 🛡️ updated to april 2026 security patch. notes: your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. performance will return to normal after the update is complete. ab ab odm product system system_dlkm system_ext vendor vendor_dlkm odm product system system_dlkm system_ext vendor vendor_dlkm
